title: Glasgow Central station remains closed after major fire and building collapse
summary_full: Fire, believed to have started in vape shop, gutted building next to station and destroyed shops, salon and cafeGlasgow Central is to remain closed until at least Tuesday after a building next door to Scotland’s busiest railway station collapsed during a major fire.National Rail said the station would remain closed with “no estimate on when the station will reopen” after the fire, believed to have started in a vape shop in Union Street on Sunday afternoon.
